channel.title: Luke Thompson - Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
channel.description: Current profile, selected project work, and AI operations resources from Luke Thompson, fractional Chief AI Officer and co-founder of The Ops Guide.

image.title: Luke Thompson - Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO)

item.title: Luke Thompson - Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
item.description: Luke Thompson is a fractional Chief AI Officer and co-founder of The Ops Guide, helping CEOs turn AI into ROI through strategy, automation, operating systems, and practical implementation.
item.content:encoded: Luke Thompson is a fractional Chief AI Officer and co-founder of The Ops Guide, helping CEOs turn AI into ROI through strategy, automation, operating systems, and practical implementation.

item.title: The Ops Guide - Selected AI Operations Projects
item.description: Anonymized selected project work including AI services operating systems, agentic commerce readiness audits, Company OS prototypes, AI operations assessments, talent workflow platforms, retail concierge platforms, and training/compliance operations platforms.
item.content:encoded: Anonymized selected project work for Luke Thompson and The Ops Guide, focused on AI operations, workflow automation, internal tools, and business operating systems.

item.title: Current Search Keywords and Positioning
item.description: Keyword strategy aligned with Luke Thompson's current positioning as a fractional Chief AI Officer, co-founder of The Ops Guide, and AI operations advisor.

item.title: TEDx Talk: AI and the Art of Adaptability
item.description: Luke Thompson's TEDx presentation on AI, adaptability, reskilling, and leadership in changing workplaces.
